findings.description: safe_mean materializes the entire input via list(values); an entry point streaming an unbounded or attacker-sized iterable could exhaust memory (O(n) memory DoS, but amplification is caller-bounded with no small-input blow-up).
percentile calls sorted(values), fully materializing the iterable; same unbounded-input memory-exhaustion exposure as safe_mean if a public entry point feeds attacker-controlled stream data.

StreamingMedian.add uses insort on a Python list (O(n) shift per insertion, O(n^2) total); an attacker who can drive a high-volume median stream causes quadratic CPU consumption — a weak algorithmic-complexity DoS, caller-volume-bounded rather than single-payload amplified.
